kind: StatefulSet
metadata:

{"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"StatefulSet","metadata":{"annotations":{},"labels":{"app.kubernetes.io/instance":"crdb-cluster","app.kubernetes.io/name":"cockroachdb"},"name":"crdb-cluster","namespace":"cockroachdb"},"spec":{"podManagementPolicy":"Parallel","replicas":3,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app.kubernetes.io/instance":"crdb-cluster","app.kubernetes.io/name":"cockroachdb"}},"serviceName":"crdb-cluster","template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app.kubernetes.io/instance":"crdb-cluster","app.kubernetes.io/name":"cockroachdb"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","exec   creationTimestamp: "2026-06-18T13:20:07Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
  name: crdb-cluster
  namespace: cockroachdb
  resourceVersion: "325299"
  uid: 477b0391-5278-45a0-b5ca-8961b20e993e
spec:
  persistentVolumeClaimRetentionPolicy:
    whenDeleted: Retain
    whenScaled: Retain
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
      app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
  serviceName: crdb-cluster
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
        app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - exec /cockroach/cockroach start --logtostderr=INFO --insecure --advertise-host=$(POD_NAME).crdb-cluster.$(POD_NAMESPACE).svc.cluster.local
          --http-addr=0.0.0.0:8080 --port=26257 --cache=25% --max-sql-memory=25% --join=crdb-cluster-0.crdb-cluster.$(POD_NAMESPACE).svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-1.crdb-cluster.$(POD_NAMESPACE).svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-2.crdb-cluster.$(POD_NAMESPACE).svc.cluster.local:26257
        env:
        - name: POD_NAME
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              apiVersion: v1
              fieldPath: metadata.name
        - name: POD_NAMESPACE
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              apiVersion: v1
              fieldPath: metadata.namespace
        image: cockroachdb/cockroach:v24.1.0
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        livenessProbe:
          failureThreshold: 3
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: http
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 5
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 1
        name: db
        ports:
        - containerPort: 26257
          name: grpc
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
          protocol: TCP
        readinessProbe:
          failureThreshold: 2
          httpGet:
            path: /health?ready=1
            port: http
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 1
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: "1"
            memory: 2Gi
          requests:
            cpu: "1"
            memory: 2Gi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /cockroach/cockroach-data
          name: datadir
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: crdb-cluster-sa
      serviceAccountName: crdb-cluster-sa
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
  updateStrategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      partition: 0
    type: RollingUpdate
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - apiVersion: v1
    kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
        app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
      name: datadir
    spec:
      accessModes:
      - ReadWriteOnce
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 10Gi
      volumeMode: Filesystem
    status:
      phase: Pending

input.command: kubectl -n cockroachdb get pod openssl-toolbox -o yaml 2>&1 | sed -n '1,80p'; echo "===WHICH==="; kubectl -n cockroachdb exec openssl-toolbox -- sh -c 'which openssl cockroach 2>&1; openssl version 2>&1; ls /cockroach 2>&1'

content.text: Now I'll generate CockroachDB-compatible certs inside the openssl-toolbox pod. Let me write the generation script.

input.command:
cat > /tmp/gencerts.sh <<'SCRIPT'
set -e
cd /certs 2>/dev/null || { mkdir -p /certs && cd /certs; }
rm -f *
touch index.txt
echo '01' > serial.txt

# ---------- ca.cnf ----------
cat > ca.cnf <<'EOF'
[ca]
default_ca = CA_default
[CA_default]
default_days = 3650
database = index.txt
serial = serial.txt
default_md = sha256
copy_extensions = copy
unique_subject = no
[usr_cert]
basicConstraints = critical,CA:false
[v3_ca]
basicConstraints = critical,CA:true,pathlen:1
keyUsage = critical,digitalSignature,cRLSign,keyCertSign
[signing_policy]
organizationName = supplied
commonName = optional
[signing_node_req]
keyUsage = critical,digitalSignature,keyEncipherment
extendedKeyUsage = serverAuth,clientAuth
[signing_client_req]
keyUsage = critical,digitalSignature,keyEncipherment
extendedKeyUsage = clientAuth
EOF

# ---------- CA ----------
openssl genrsa -out ca.key 2048
chmod 400 ca.key
openssl req -new -x509 -config ca.cnf -extensions v3_ca -key ca.key -out ca.crt \
  -days 3650 -batch -subj "/O=Cockroach/CN=Cockroach CA"

# ---------- node cert ----------
cat > node.cnf <<'EOF'
[req]
prompt=no
distinguished_name = distinguished_name
req_extensions = extensions
[distinguished_name]
organizationName = Cockroach
commonName = node
[extensions]
subjectAltName = critical,DNS:localhost,DNS:node,DNS:crdb-cluster,DNS:crdb-cluster.cockroachdb,DNS:crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local,DNS:crdb-cluster-public,DNS:crdb-cluster-public.cockroachdb,DNS:crdb-cluster-public.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local,DNS:crdb-cluster-0.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local,DNS:crdb-cluster-1.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local,DNS:crdb-cluster-2.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local,DNS:*.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local,IP:127.0.0.1
EOF
openssl genrsa -out node.key 2048
chmod 400 node.key
openssl req -new -config node.cnf -key node.key -out node.csr -batch
openssl ca -config ca.cnf -keyfile ca.key -cert ca.crt -policy signing_policy \
  -extensions signing_node_req -out node.crt -outdir . -in node.csr -batch

# ---------- client root cert ----------
cat > client.cnf <<'EOF'
[req]
prompt=no
distinguished_name = distinguished_name
req_extensions = extensions
[distinguished_name]
organizationName = Cockroach
commonName = root
[extensions]
subjectAltName = critical,DNS:root,DNS:localhost,IP:127.0.0.1
EOF
openssl genrsa -out client.root.key 2048
chmod 400 client.root.key
openssl req -new -config client.cnf -key client.root.key -out client.root.csr -batch
openssl ca -config ca.cnf -keyfile ca.key -cert ca.crt -policy signing_policy \
  -extensions signing_client_req -out client.root.crt -outdir . -in client.root.csr -batch

echo "=== generated ==="
ls -l /certs/*.crt /certs/*.key
SCRIPT
kubectl -n cockroachdb cp /tmp/gencerts.sh openssl-toolbox:/tmp/gencerts.sh
kubectl -n cockroachdb exec openssl-toolbox -- sh /tmp/gencerts.sh 2>&1 | tail -20

content.text: Certs generated. Now let me pull them out and create a Kubernetes secret.

input.command:
cd /tmp && rm -rf crdbcerts && mkdir crdbcerts
for f in ca.crt node.crt node.key client.root.crt client.root.key; do
  kubectl -n cockroachdb cp openssl-toolbox:/certs/$f /tmp/crdbcerts/$f
done
ls -l /tmp/crdbcerts
echo "=== verify node cert SAN ==="
openssl x509 -in /tmp/crdbcerts/node.crt -noout -ext subjectAltName 2>&1
echo "=== verify EKU ==="
openssl x509 -in /tmp/crdbcerts/node.crt -noout -ext extendedKeyUsage 2>&1
openssl x509 -in /tmp/crdbcerts/client.root.crt -noout -subject -ext extendedKeyUsage 2>&1

content.text: Certs look correct. Now create the secret and patch the StatefulSet to run in secure mode.

input.command:
cd /tmp/crdbcerts
kubectl -n cockroachdb create secret generic crdb-certs \
  --from-file=ca.crt --from-file=node.crt --from-file=node.key \
  --from-file=client.root.crt --from-file=client.root.key \
  --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f - 2>&1

content.content:
secret/crdb-certs created
Shell cwd was reset to /mydata/karma/runs/examples-rerun/cockroachdb-generate-cert-20260618_131942/stages/stage_1

content.text: Now patch the StatefulSet for secure mode with an initContainer that fixes key permissions.

input.command:
cat > /tmp/patch.yaml <<'EOF'
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      volumes:
      - name: certs-src
        secret:
          secretName: crdb-certs
          defaultMode: 0400
      - name: certs
        emptyDir: {}
      initContainers:
      - name: init-certs
        image: cockroachdb/cockroach:v24.1.0
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          cp /certs-src/* /cockroach/cockroach-certs/
          chmod 700 /cockroach/cockroach-certs
          chmod 600 /cockroach/cockroach-certs/*.key
          chmod 644 /cockroach/cockroach-certs/*.crt
          ls -l /cockroach/cockroach-certs
        volumeMounts:
        - name: certs-src
          mountPath: /certs-src
          readOnly: true
        - name: certs
          mountPath: /cockroach/cockroach-certs
      containers:
      - name: db
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - exec /cockroach/cockroach start --logtostderr=INFO --certs-dir=/cockroach/cockroach-certs --advertise-host=$(POD_NAME).crdb-cluster.$(POD_NAMESPACE).svc.cluster.local --http-addr=0.0.0.0:8080 --port=26257 --cache=25% --max-sql-memory=25% --join=crdb-cluster-0.crdb-cluster.$(POD_NAMESPACE).svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-1.crdb-cluster.$(POD_NAMESPACE).svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-2.crdb-cluster.$(POD_NAMESPACE).svc.cluster.local:26257
        volumeMounts:
        - name: datadir
          mountPath: /cockroach/cockroach-data
        - name: certs
          mountPath: /cockroach/cockroach-certs
EOF
kubectl -n cockroachdb patch statefulset crdb-cluster --patch-file /tmp/patch.yaml 2>&1

content.text: The probes use HTTP but secure mode serves HTTPS on the http port. Let me fix probe schemes.
Now restart all pods simultaneously (a mixed secure/insecure cluster can't form quorum, so I delete all at once).

input.command:
kubectl -n cockroachdb delete pod crdb-cluster-0 crdb-cluster-1 crdb-cluster-2 --wait=false 2>&1
sleep 5
kubectl -n cockroachdb get pods 2>&1
input.description: Delete all crdb pods to restart secure

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 40); do
  out=$(kubectl -n cockroachdb get pods -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cockroachdb --no-headers 2>&1)
  ready=$(echo "$out" | grep -c '1/1.*Running')
  echo "[$i] ready=$ready"; echo "$out"
  [ "$ready" = "3" ] && break
  sleep 6
done
